newReleases.name: Starfall Pegs: Pinball Run
newReleases.desc:
Starfall Pegs is a vertical physics arcade game about timing one clean shot and watching it turn into a chain of starry rebounds. Lock the swinging angle, choose your power, then send the ball through glowing peg fields to build combos and reach the goal zone.

Runs are quick, tactile, and different every time. Play a 12-level Star Trail run, or jump into Endless Sky and push each round a little further.

Key Features:
- Two-tap launch: lock angle first, then lock power
- Physics-driven bounces across glowing peg boards
- Chain scoring, combo multipliers, and satisfying hit feedback
- 12 handcrafted adventure levels with rising score targets
- Endless mode with tougher rounds and shifting boards
- 8 upgrades: Extra Ball, Split Ball, Blast Pegs, Magnetic Goal, Combo Surge, Big Ball, Slow Motion, and Wide Goal
- Local best score, best endless round, sound, music, and haptic settings
- No ads, no in-app purchases, and no account sign-in

Great for:
- Short arcade sessions with real bounce physics
- Players who enjoy pinball, peg games, combos, and score chasing
- A quick one-hand game during breaks or commutes
- A complete game without ad breaks or energy timers

Note:
Starfall Pegs 1.0 is a single-player arcade game. It does not include online multiplayer, leaderboards, accounts, ads, or in-app purchases. Scores and settings are saved locally on your device.

No ads. No in-app purchases. No tracking. It even works completely offline, so you can play on the plane, on the train, or anywhere with no signal.

Every puzzle is freshly generated, with words woven together so they cross and overlap for a satisfying challenge. Trace a word with your finger and it lights up in its own bright colour — the grid fills with a rainbow as you go.

— THREE WAYS TO PLAY —

• Relaxed — No timer, no pressure. Just you and the grid. Find every word at your own pace.
• Survivor — A countdown ticks down on every word. Find one in time and the clock resets. How long can you last?
• Endless — Clear the board and a fresh one appears. Keep your streak alive level after level, forever.

— BUILT FOR EVERYONE —

• Three grid sizes: Easy, Medium and Hard
• Words run across, down, diagonally and even backwards as you level up
• Smart selection detects a word the moment you trace it — no fiddly tapping
• Satisfying sounds and haptics that make every find feel good

— 100+ THEMES —

From Animals, Food and Space to Dinosaurs, Mythical Beasts, World Cities, Coffee Shop and dozens more. There's always a new topic to discover, and you'll never get the same theme twice in a row.

— TRACK YOUR PROGRESS —

• Dozens of achievements to unlock
• Detailed stats: games played, best times, longest strea

• Exciting combo chains and satisfying gameplay
• Easy to learn, yet hard to put down

Keep evolving through the universe and challenge yourself to achieve the ultimate high score!

newReleases.name: Midnight Telescope
newReleases.desc:
Midnight Telescope is a starry sky telescope-themed observation and memory challenge game. You need to move the telescope lens to find specific mahjong tile patterns on a hidden board and quickly tap the correct target when it appears.

Each round presents a target tile. The patterns on the board are hidden by the night, with only the areas the lens passes over illuminated. You need to rely on observation, judgment, and memory to find the correct answer within a limited time or opportunity.

Gameplay Features:
Move the telescope lens to gradually reveal hidden tiles.
Find matching patterns on the board based on the top target tile.
Tap the correct target to score points; tapping the wrong target deducts chances or time.
Four modes: Classic, Time, Memory, and Endless.

Memory mode: Memorize the tile first, then find the target from memory.

Endless mode: Challenge yourself to achieve consecutive hits.

Records best scores, fastest completion times, and total number of tiles found.

Adjustable lens size and supports sound effects and haptic settings.

Midnight Telescope uses mahjong tile patterns as visual recognition elements. The core experience is an observation, memory, and reaction challenge; it does not include mahjong games or gambling content.

newReleases.name: RemaDivi
newReleases.desc:
When the logic behind the numbers suddenly clicks, a quiet confidence emerges—not from rote memorization of formulas, but from truly grasping why a remainder lands where it does. RemaDivi was created for that very moment.

Turn Division into a Journey of Discovery

Step into a vibrant, light-filled puzzle world where every move is a mini-exercise in logic. Place number cards onto the grid to match target remainders, transforming abstract division into a tangible, fun, and deeply rewarding experience.
From accessible introductory levels to the ultimate challenge of the "Grand Master Gate," every stage encourages thoughtful reflection rather than rushed action.

A Journey Worth Taking
Explore hundreds of meticulously crafted campaign levels across five stunning regions. Unlock new territories on the map, earn star ratings, and prove that persistence itself is a mark of wisdom.

Learn at Your Own Pace
Eight guided lessons delve into concepts like division, remainders, and modular arithmetic thinking—each followed by a quick quiz to reinforce your learning. Freely explore the "Remainder Workshop" whenever you like, without pressure or judgment.

Play Your Way
Tackle fresh, date-generated "Daily Challenges"; race against the clock in "Speed ​​Rush" mode to set new win streaks; or hone your skills in "Training Mode" by exploring pattern-based puzzles and complex layouts. No matter your learning stage, this game adapts perfectly to your needs.

Truly Yours, Always
Your game progress

newReleases.name: Farm Puzzle Logic
newReleases.desc:
This is a casual puzzle game with a lively pace, simple controls, and a growing sense of achievement the more you play. Players need to observe the block arrangement and route layout inside the maze, choose the right movement order for each block, and help them leave the maze smoothly. The gameplay is simple and intuitive, but completing each level also requires a bit of planning and thinking.

The levels progress from easy to challenging. Early stages are simple to pick up, while later levels gradually introduce more difficulty. You need to plan each move carefully, avoid blocks getting in each other’s way, and find a more efficient way to complete the level. Whether you want to relax for a few minutes or take on a greater challenge, you can find your own pace here.

The game also includes a leaderboard system. You can keep improving your results, challenge higher rankings, and see if you can reach the top of the leaderboard. Every completed level and every improvement in performance can help you move one step higher.

There is also a cute pet-growing system in the game. By completing levels and daily tasks, you can unlock pets, raise them, and let them grow with you. Pets not only make the gameplay more enjoyable, but also add a stronger sense of companionship and collection fun to your journey.

Simple and intuitive maze gameplay, easy to pick up and suitable for all types of players.
Rich level designs, progressing step by step from relaxing experiences to strategic chall

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

This is a puzzle game designed for moments of focus and relaxation. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or enjoying a quiet break, the smooth flow and satisfying interactions make it easy to settle in and keep playing.

- Move pieces to complete parts of a picture

- Clear completed sections to make room for new pieces
- Watch fresh tiles fall into place as the puzzle evolves
- Think ahead and manage your space to keep progressing

Factory in Bermuda gets a limited-time 9th Anniversary makeover. Complete anniversary quests to earn valuable loot and upgrade Coin Machines, vending machines, and Revival Points. If a teammate is eliminated, you can interact with their loot box to revive them on the spot!

[CS Perk Points]
CS now features a new Perk Point system that lets you unlock skill boosts, Awakened Weapons, and other buffs, adding more strategic choices to every match.

[Skill Boost & Awakened Weapons]
New skill boost and weapon awakening systems are now available in both BR and CS. Strengthen character skills, choose different upgrade paths, and use Weapon Awakeners to increase weapon power for a richer combat experience.

[BR Match Review]
Want to improve your BR tactics? After ranked matches, review replays to track movement paths, eliminations, and enemy positions, helping you break down every match and sharpen your strategy.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

updates.name: Amaze GO!
updates.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for

updates.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

updates.name: Sunday City: Life Simulator
updates.desc:
May your dreams become reality in Sunday City.

Sunday City is an eternal summer simulator, where each day is like a weekend, and the city hums to the rhythm of your desires. You don't need to wait for a vacation here — ocean, sun, and neon city lights are always right there with you. Choose your lifestyle: calm and relaxed or full of drive and adventure. Experience that unparalleled vibe and become a success!

Reach the Top
Go on an unbelievable journey from a simple courier to a multimillionaire. Complete quests: work and get paid, partake in sports car racing, chat with your friends, and open businesses. Express yourself in any way possible, and then, all the roads to Sunday City will be open for you.

Start a Business
Open your first café, electronics or comic book shop. That way, you'll be earning profits and thus gradually getting closer and closer to the status of a successful entrepreneur, simultaneously starting new businesses and building your capital. But not everything is so serious here, so relax, you've still got beach parties to go to!

Time for Fun
In Sunday City, you can hang out in the chat, socialize, and find new friends. As well as enjoy endless parties, shop around, and switch skins to your mood. Riding on a scooter or driving a sports car, luxury brands and private parties or athletic style and yoga classes, beach volleyball, cozy nights with friends — it's all up to you. All this will become your reality, just take a step towards your dream!

Loyal Fri

updates.name: Soccer Superstar
updates.desc:
Play the brand new football game Soccer Super Star and enjoy the insanely real, ultra-fast and immersive football experience! 

Love action arcade soccer but lack the time to practice? The new Soccer Super Star’s very easy to learn game controls allows you to jump-start the fun. Just flick your finger across the screen to kick the ball and score a goal! 

Sounds easy, right? Wrong. As you progress through the game, shots become more challenging and you’ll need a solid strategy to bend shots and split defenses. Soccer Super Star doesn’t get overly complicated but maintains a steady increase in difficulty while offering the best flick to kick experience! Be the hero in every match. 

Soccer Super Star’s gameplay concept is expertly done, the high degree of independence allows you to reflect your personal strategy in the game as you level up through your dream Leagues. Topnotch artwork and dynamic levels mean a truly world-class immersive football (soccer) game experience.

Download to play today and score big! Yes, you can even play offline.

GAME FEATURES:

• PLAY OFFLINE - FREE
It’s true, you can play and manage your team of eleven without the internet!

• STAR SOCCER PLAYERS TO UNLOCK
Utilizing the latest 2020 motion capture technology of real star players

• IMMERSIVE 3D MOBILE ENGINE & ADVANCED GAME A.I.
Intelligent game A.I. allows realistic freedom, powerful simulation with accurate ball physics. Make your way through the Leagues to be a Soccer Superstar!

• JOIN WEEKLY

all.name: Starfall Pegs: Pinball Run
all.desc:
Starfall Pegs is a vertical physics arcade game about timing one clean shot and watching it turn into a chain of starry rebounds. Lock the swinging angle, choose your power, then send the ball through glowing peg fields to build combos and reach the goal zone.

Runs are quick, tactile, and different every time. Play a 12-level Star Trail run, or jump into Endless Sky and push each round a little further.

Key Features:
- Two-tap launch: lock angle first, then lock power
- Physics-driven bounces across glowing peg boards
- Chain scoring, combo multipliers, and satisfying hit feedback
- 12 handcrafted adventure levels with rising score targets
- Endless mode with tougher rounds and shifting boards
- 8 upgrades: Extra Ball, Split Ball, Blast Pegs, Magnetic Goal, Combo Surge, Big Ball, Slow Motion, and Wide Goal
- Local best score, best endless round, sound, music, and haptic settings
- No ads, no in-app purchases, and no account sign-in

Great for:
- Short arcade sessions with real bounce physics
- Players who enjoy pinball, peg games, combos, and score chasing
- A quick one-hand game during breaks or commutes
- A complete game without ad breaks or energy timers

Note:
Starfall Pegs 1.0 is a single-player arcade game. It does not include online multiplayer, leaderboards, accounts, ads, or in-app purchases. Scores and settings are saved locally on your device.

all.name: Midnight Telescope
all.desc:
Midnight Telescope is a starry sky telescope-themed observation and memory challenge game. You need to move the telescope lens to find specific mahjong tile patterns on a hidden board and quickly tap the correct target when it appears.

Each round presents a target tile. The patterns on the board are hidden by the night, with only the areas the lens passes over illuminated. You need to rely on observation, judgment, and memory to find the correct answer within a limited time or opportunity.

Gameplay Features:
Move the telescope lens to gradually reveal hidden tiles.
Find matching patterns on the board based on the top target tile.
Tap the correct target to score points; tapping the wrong target deducts chances or time.
Four modes: Classic, Time, Memory, and Endless.

Memory mode: Memorize the tile first, then find the target from memory.

Endless mode: Challenge yourself to achieve consecutive hits.

Records best scores, fastest completion times, and total number of tiles found.

Adjustable lens size and supports sound effects and haptic settings.

Midnight Telescope uses mahjong tile patterns as visual recognition elements. The core experience is an observation, memory, and reaction challenge; it does not include mahjong games or gambling content.

all.name: RemaDivi
all.desc:
When the logic behind the numbers suddenly clicks, a quiet confidence emerges—not from rote memorization of formulas, but from truly grasping why a remainder lands where it does. RemaDivi was created for that very moment.

Turn Division into a Journey of Discovery

Step into a vibrant, light-filled puzzle world where every move is a mini-exercise in logic. Place number cards onto the grid to match target remainders, transforming abstract division into a tangible, fun, and deeply rewarding experience.
From accessible introductory levels to the ultimate challenge of the "Grand Master Gate," every stage encourages thoughtful reflection rather than rushed action.

A Journey Worth Taking
Explore hundreds of meticulously crafted campaign levels across five stunning regions. Unlock new territories on the map, earn star ratings, and prove that persistence itself is a mark of wisdom.

Learn at Your Own Pace
Eight guided lessons delve into concepts like division, remainders, and modular arithmetic thinking—each followed by a quick quiz to reinforce your learning. Freely explore the "Remainder Workshop" whenever you like, without pressure or judgment.

Play Your Way
Tackle fresh, date-generated "Daily Challenges"; race against the clock in "Speed ​​Rush" mode to set new win streaks; or hone your skills in "Training Mode" by exploring pattern-based puzzles and complex layouts. No matter your learning stage, this game adapts perfectly to your needs.

Truly Yours, Always
Your game progress
all.coreLoop: When the logic behind the numbers suddenly clicks, a quiet confidence emerges—not from rote memorization of formulas, but from truly grasping why a remainder lands where it does. RemaDivi was created for that very moment.

all.name: Farm Puzzle Logic
all.desc:
This is a casual puzzle game with a lively pace, simple controls, and a growing sense of achievement the more you play. Players need to observe the block arrangement and route layout inside the maze, choose the right movement order for each block, and help them leave the maze smoothly. The gameplay is simple and intuitive, but completing each level also requires a bit of planning and thinking.

The levels progress from easy to challenging. Early stages are simple to pick up, while later levels gradually introduce more difficulty. You need to plan each move carefully, avoid blocks getting in each other’s way, and find a more efficient way to complete the level. Whether you want to relax for a few minutes or take on a greater challenge, you can find your own pace here.

The game also includes a leaderboard system. You can keep improving your results, challenge higher rankings, and see if you can reach the top of the leaderboard. Every completed level and every improvement in performance can help you move one step higher.

There is also a cute pet-growing system in the game. By completing levels and daily tasks, you can unlock pets, raise them, and let them grow with you. Pets not only make the gameplay more enjoyable, but also add a stronger sense of companionship and collection fun to your journey.

Simple and intuitive maze gameplay, easy to pick up and suitable for all types of players.

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

This is a puzzle game designed for moments of focus and relaxation. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or enjoying a quiet break, the smooth flow and satisfying interactions make it easy to settle in and keep playing.

HOW TO PLAY
- Move pieces to complete parts of a picture
- Connect matching fragments to reveal the full image
- Clear completed sections to make room for new pieces
- Watch fresh tiles fall into place as the puzzle evolves
- Think ahead and manage your space to keep progressing

The mechanics are simple at first, but each level introduces new layouts that encourage thoughtful play and gentle strategy.

- A New Kind of Jigsaw Experience
The falling system adds movement and rhythm to traditional puzzles, creating a more dynamic way to play.

Explore a wide range of scenes, from nature and everyday objects to artistic compositions, all designed to be visually pleasing.
- Play at Your Own Pace
No timers, no pressure—just a relaxed environment where you can enjoy solving puzzles in your own time.
- Designed for Focus and Relaxation

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

all.name: Amaze GO!
all.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for
all.releaseNotes: Optimized user experience and performance!

all.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money (including random items). If you don't want to purchase game items for real money, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings.

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Princesses from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the A
all.releaseNotes:

• NEW EVOLUTION: Princess, shoots frost arrows that slow enemies down
• NEW HERO: Tombstone, unleashes Tomb Queen
• NEW GAME MODE: Princess Gambit – no King Tower, no deck draft
• NEW Collection Level, replacing King’s Journey
• COMING IN JULY: New Card + C.H.A.O.S 2.0
• Plus bug fixes and improvements

all.name: Tiles Survive!
all.desc:
Enter the world of "Tiles Survive!" and guide your team of survivors through a harsh wilderness. As the core of your survivor team, explore the wild, gather key resources, and use them wisely to strengthen your shelter.
Venture into different tiles and expand your territory. Improve how you manage resources, build and upgrade structures, and connect electricity to speed up production. Create a self-sufficient shelter where every decision shapes your survivors’ future.

Game Features:

● Operations & Management
Enhance your production structures for smoother workflows. Use electricity to run your shelter more efficiently. Unlock and upgrade more structures to meet your growing needs.

● Assign Survivors
Assign jobs to your survivors, like hunters, chefs, or lumberjacks. Pay attention to their health and morale to keep productivity high.

● Resource Collection
Explore further and discover unique resources in different biomes. Gather and use every resource to your advantage.

● Multi-map & Collectibles
Travel through multiple maps to find loot and special items. Bring them back to decorate and improve your shelter.

● Recruit Heroes
Find heroes with special skills and traits who boost your shelter’s capabilities.

● Form Alliances
Team up with friends to stand against common threats, such as severe weather and wild creatures.

In "Tiles Survive!", every choice matters. How you manage resources, plan your shelter, and explore the unknown will decide your fate. Are you ready to fa

all.name: Sunday City: Life Simulator
all.desc:
May your dreams become reality in Sunday City.

Sunday City is an eternal summer simulator, where each day is like a weekend, and the city hums to the rhythm of your desires. You don't need to wait for a vacation here — ocean, sun, and neon city lights are always right there with you. Choose your lifestyle: calm and relaxed or full of drive and adventure. Experience that unparalleled vibe and become a success!

Reach the Top
Go on an unbelievable journey from a simple courier to a multimillionaire. Complete quests: work and get paid, partake in sports car racing, chat with your friends, and open businesses. Express yourself in any way possible, and then, all the roads to Sunday City will be open for you.

Start a Business
Open your first café, electronics or comic book shop. That way, you'll be earning profits and thus gradually getting closer and closer to the status of a successful entrepreneur, simultaneously starting new businesses and building your capital. But not everything is so serious here, so relax, you've still got beach parties to go to!

Time for Fun
In Sunday City, you can hang out in the chat, socialize, and find new friends. As well as enjoy endless parties, shop around, and switch skins to your mood. Riding on a scooter or driving a sports car, luxury brands and private parties or athletic style and yoga classes, beach volleyball, cozy nights with friends — it's all up to you. All this will become your reality, just take a step towards your dream!

Loyal Fri
all.releaseNotes:
Residents of Sunday City, we have great news! You can finally acquire your own apartment! Also, a new ship is arriving in the city, and there’s much more to come.
- Apartment: purchase your own living space, customize it and invite friends over.
- Trophies: show off special awards in your apartment.
- Meowpatra's Tales: a new ship has arrived at the pier, come check it out!
- Season Pass: complete quests, earn tons of rewards, and obtain unique skins.
- Businesses: 15 new businesses await you!

all.name: Soccer Superstar
all.desc:
Play the brand new football game Soccer Super Star and enjoy the insanely real, ultra-fast and immersive football experience! 

Love action arcade soccer but lack the time to practice? The new Soccer Super Star’s very easy to learn game controls allows you to jump-start the fun. Just flick your finger across the screen to kick the ball and score a goal! 

Sounds easy, right? Wrong. As you progress through the game, shots become more challenging and you’ll need a solid strategy to bend shots and split defenses. Soccer Super Star doesn’t get overly complicated but maintains a steady increase in difficulty while offering the best flick to kick experience! Be the hero in every match. 

Soccer Super Star’s gameplay concept is expertly done, the high degree of independence allows you to reflect your personal strategy in the game as you level up through your dream Leagues. Topnotch artwork and dynamic levels mean a truly world-class immersive football (soccer) game experience.

Download to play today and score big! Yes, you can even play offline.

GAME FEATURES:

• PLAY OFFLINE - FREE
It’s true, you can play and manage your team of eleven without the internet!

• STAR SOCCER PLAYERS TO UNLOCK
Utilizing the latest 2020 motion capture technology of real star players

• IMMERSIVE 3D MOBILE ENGINE & ADVANCED GAME A.I.
Intelligent game A.I. allows realistic freedom, powerful simulation with accurate ball physics. Make your way through the Leagues to be a Soccer Superstar!

• JOIN WEEKLY

all.name: MapleStory : Idle RPG
all.desc:
MapleStory is finally here as an idle RPG!
Keep leveling up—even when you're idle! Start your Maple adventure now!

▶ Auto Battle & Auto Growth
Your character never stops getting stronger, no matter where you are—school, work, or bed!
Sit back, relax, and enjoy the game.

▶ Reliable Companion System
No more battling alone. 
Gather diverse Companions and shape your own battle style.

▶ Various Growth Dungeons
Simpler, more fun than ever!
Learn the boss's patterns and clear the dungeon.

▶ PVP Arena of Intense Clashes
Prove your strength!
Claim victory in the ultimate battlefield of champions.

▶ Cute Styling Items
Stand out with adorable and unique outfits.

■ App Permission Information
In order to provide services below, we are requesting certain permissions.

[Optional Permission]
Camera: To capture photos or record videos for attaching and submitting to Customer Support or other relevant entities
Microphone : Required to record videos for submitting to Support
Photos: To save and upload photos and videos
Advertising ID: To provide customized ads and analyze service usage

※ Granting or denying Optional Permissions does not affect gameplay.

[Permission Management]
▶Go to Settings > Privacy, select a permission and toggle the button next to the app's name.
